use_cases: Search input with real-time suggestion dropdown for quick option selection
Location or address autocomplete in forms for shipping or billing
Category or tag picker with scrollable option list
Filter input displaying available options in an expandable dropdown
Text input with predictive suggestions to accelerate user data entry
ai_summary: An autocomplete input component that provides a searchable dropdown with suggestions as users type. Built with Base UI primitives, it supports multiple sizes, icons for clear and expand actions, and smooth interaction patterns for desktop and mobile.
